name: Nicereply API
description: REST API for managing customer satisfaction surveys, retrieving ratings and comments, tracking CSAT, CES, and NPS scores, and managing users, teams, and customers within the Nicereply platform.
featureList: Track CSAT, CES, and NPS scores
Integration with Zendesk, Front, and Helpscout

potentialAction.name: List Ratings
potentialAction.description: Retrieve CSAT, CES, or NPS ratings with optional date range and pagination filters

potentialAction.name: Get Survey Statistics
potentialAction.description: Retrieve aggregate statistics for surveys including response counts and scores

potentialAction.name: Manage Customers
potentialAction.description: List, retrieve, and view ratings and statistics for customers

potentialAction.name: Manage Users
potentialAction.description: Create, list, and retrieve agent and user records with associated ratings and team memberships

potentialAction.name: Track Unsubscribes
potentialAction.description: Retrieve email unsubscribe records for surveys
